Colours

The AgDS-vue colour system is derived from the Agriculture Design System brand palette. Every colour is available as a --agds-color-* CSS custom property.

Brand

Core palette. Use brand as the primary action colour throughout.

Brand

#00698f

--agds-color-brand

Brand hover

#005572

--agds-color-brand-hover

Brand active

#004260

--agds-color-brand-active

Brand muted

#e0f0f5

--agds-color-brand-muted

Brand muted fg

#003d54

--agds-color-brand-muted-fg

Text

Text

#313131

--agds-color-text

Text muted

#6e6e6e

--agds-color-text-muted

Text inverse

#ffffff

--agds-color-text-inverse

Text disabled

#9d9d9d

--agds-color-text-disabled

Background

Background

#ffffff

--agds-color-bg

Background subtle

#f5f5f5

--agds-color-bg-subtle

Background muted

#e8e8e8

--agds-color-bg-muted

Focus

Purple focus ring — 3px solid, meets WCAG 2.2 focus appearance.

Focus ring

#9263de

--agds-color-focus

Status

Success

#0b7e00

--agds-color-success

Success muted

#e5f5e3

--agds-color-success-muted

Warning

#c56900

--agds-color-warning

Warning muted

#fdf3e3

--agds-color-warning-muted

Error

#d60000

--agds-color-error

Error muted

#fde8e8

--agds-color-error-muted
